metadata.title: David Birger App
metadata.description: Protected David Birger application for customers and admin operations.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.description: Sign in with your email and password to continue to the David Birger app.
signIn.passwordHint: You can update your password after signing in.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.description: Create your David Birger app account.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Workspace summary and room for future Vercel analytics blocks.

invoice.title: Invoice
invoice.description: Create Monobank invoices and copy checkout links quickly.

pending.title: Pending Invoices
pending.description: View and manage invoices awaiting payment.

paymentHistory.title: Payment History
paymentHistory.description: Review canonical app payment history from the payments table.

statementAudit.title: Statement Audit
statementAudit.description: Inspect the live Monobank statement feed for provider reconciliation.

runtime.title: Runtime
runtime.description: Monitor environment readiness and protected API surfaces.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your Better Auth account, password, and session settings.

purchases.title: Purchases
purchases.description: View your purchased products and payment history.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account profile and session security.

dashboardHome.purchasesDescription: View products you've purchased and their status.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.descriptionAdmin: Update your Better Auth profile and session security without leaving the admin workspace.
settings.descriptionUser: Update your Better Auth profile and session security.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update the display name used across the app.
profile.name: Full name

password.title: Password
password.description: Change your password and revoke any other active sessions.
password.mismatch: The new passwords do not match.

session.title: Session
session.description: This workspace is gated by Better Auth and the admin role.

unauthorized.title: Access restricted
unauthorized.description: This workspace is limited to users with the Better Auth `admin` role.
unauthorized.body: Your account is signed in, but it does not have admin permissions for this section. If you are a regular user, you can access your personal dashboard.

checkout.notAvailable: Product not available for direct purchase.
